items.definition_en: The heart is the organ that pumps blood through the body.
items.example_en: Exercise is good for your heart.

items.definition_en: The brain controls how you think, feel, and move.
items.example_en: He used his brain to solve the problem.

items.definition_en: A lung is the organ that helps you breathe.
A kidney helps clean your blood inside the body.
items.example_en: Each person usually has two kidneys.

items.definition_en: The liver is an organ that helps clean the blood.
items.example_en: Alcohol is bad for your liver.

items.definition_en: The stomach is where your food goes after you eat.
items.example_en: Her stomach hurts after eating too much.

items.definition_en: The throat is the inside part of your neck.
items.example_en: I have a sore throat today.

items.definition_en: A vein is a tube that carries blood to your heart.
items.example_en: The nurse could see the vein in his arm.

items.definition_en: An artery is a blood vessel that carries blood from the heart.
items.example_en: A healthy artery keeps blood moving well.

items.definition_en: The bladder is the part of the body that holds urine.
items.example_en: He went to the bathroom because his bladder was full.

items.definition_en: The gallbladder stores a liquid that helps digest food.
items.example_en: She had an operation to remove her gallbladder.

items.definition_en: The esophagus is the tube that carries food to your stomach.
items.example_en: Food goes down the esophagus after you swallow.

items.definition_en: The intestine is where food is digested after the stomach.
items.example_en: The intestine moves food through the body.

items.definition_en: The colon is the last part of the intestine.
items.example_en: A healthy colon helps you feel good.

items.definition_en: The pancreas makes chemicals that help digest food.
items.example_en: The pancreas helps control sugar in your body.

items.definition_en: The diaphragm is a muscle that helps you breathe.
items.example_en: The diaphragm moves when you breathe in deeply.

items.definition_en: Bone marrow is the soft part inside your bones.
Skin covers and protects your body.
items.example_en: Remember to put cream on your skin.

items.definition_en: The appendix is a small organ near the intestine.
items.example_en: Her appendix was removed last year.
